summary: Iteration 51: Public Reports Feature - Complete testing of password-protected public report link functionality. All 15 backend pytest tests PASS. All frontend UI tests PASS. The feature allows admins to create a password-protected public link for external stakeholders to view reports with all tabs and filters, while hiding sensitive contact details.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 'NaN%' for percentage values when total is 0 (division by zero display issue)

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

action_items: LOW: Fix NaN% display in Educators section when total is 0 (add check for division by zero)
LOW: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance
critical_code_review_comments: Backend public link endpoints properly implemented with bcrypt password hashing
JWT tokens used for public report access with 24-hour expiration
Public report data endpoint correctly masks sensitive data (no contact details/names exposed)
Frontend PasswordGate component properly handles authentication flow
All 8 report tabs (Overview, B2C, B2B, HR-Team, Educator HR, Growth Partners, Support, P&L) accessible in public view
Date filters (Month/Year/Custom) work correctly in public reports
seed_data_creation: None - used existing public report link with token 31dc973d
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 51: Public Reports Feature fully tested and working. Admin can create/update/delete password-protected public links from Admin Reports page via 'Share Report' button. Public reports accessible at /reports/{token} with password gate. All 8 tabs visible with real-time data. Date filters (Month/Year/Custom) work. Sensitive data (contact details, names) hidden in public view. Backend endpoints: POST/GET/PATCH/DELETE /api/admin/reports/public-link (admin auth required), POST /api/public/reports/{token}/verify (password verification), GET /api/public/reports/{token}/data (with auth query param). Working credentials: admin@oll.co/admin123, public report password: demo123.
